records.subcategory: Notes: 1. These estimates are for frame and shell only. 2. Duckbill anchors furnished with basic tension fabric structures are for unpaved surfaces only. 3. For asphalt and concrete surfaces

Refer to manufacturers’ specifications and installation instructions.
